name: py2rust-ccb-legacy-nonrust-sync
title: ccb-legacy 非 rust/ 反向重命名同步（docs/scripts）
description: Sync ccb-legacy non-rust sections (docs/scripts/plans/root configs) from ccbr HEAD via reverse-rename ccbr->ccb, preserving ccb-legacy own .trellis. ccb-legacy is a separate twin lineage, never merged with ccbr.
